impact:
Item 1 from T-023, separated from the ship-to-self hull bonus fix (which landed in 58d3dfd).

Some ships have modifierInfo in the SDE that targets the wrong skill. Documented case: Sacrilege's modifierInfo targets skill 3306 (Medium Energy Turret) but the ship actually has missile bonuses in-game. Pyfa works around this with ~5000 hand-coded effect handlers in `effects.py`. Vigilant's engine trusts modifierInfo and produces wrong bonuses for these ships.

To fix properly: build an effect-handler override table for known-broken ships, keyed by ship_type_id × effect_id, that overrides the SDE modifier_info with hand-coded targeting. Or: parse `typeBonus.jsonl` trait descriptions to infer correct targeting (riskier).

Scope is large (~200+ overrides expected based on Pyfa's coverage). Splitting off to keep T-023's primary fix (ship-to-self hull bonuses) bite-sized.

Affected: Sacrilege confirmed. Other Amarr Recon ships, possibly some force recon, possibly other ships where CCP renamed/redirected hull bonuses without updating modifierInfo. Pyfa's effects.py is the canonical reference for which ships need overrides.
title: Sacrilege-class SDE modifierInfo mistargets — needs Pyfa-style effect handler override
